RecruitStage.description:
The recruitment funnel. Ordered from first contact to commissioning.

Stage transitions are recorded in RecruitStageEvent, which powers the
funnel + trend-over-time analytics.

info.description: Headless API powering the Det 695 web and iOS recruitment apps.
info.title: AFROTC Det 695 Recruitment API

get.description:
Current count of recruits per stage (respects FUNNEL_ORDER).

The from/to date window filters recruits by created_at. Returns counts for
EVERY stage in FUNNEL_ORDER, with 0 if none are at that stage.

Time-series built from RecruitStageEvent log.

For each period bucket, the number of transitions INTO each stage. Buckets
changed_at by week or month. If metric is specified, filters to that stage;
otherwise returns all stages.

Summary stat cards for dashboard: total recruits, stage counts, cadets,
open follow-ups, and a short recruits-created trend (last ~8 weeks).
Export entity data in CSV, XLSX, or PDF format.
Check if 2FA is enabled for the current user.

post.description: Initiate 2FA setup — generate secret and return provisioning URI.
Verify TOTP code to complete 2FA setup.

Bulk import potential recruits from a CSV or Excel file.

Each row is validated against RecruitCreate schema. Valid rows are imported
with a baseline stage event; invalid rows are collected into an error report.

schema.title: Response Stage History Api V1 Recruits  Recruit Id  Stage History Get
